comment: The pinned OUTPUT ANCHOR for the tolerance gate (see LOG.md 2026-07-10,
always compare a candidate against THIS build's output - never against
the candidate's predecessor - so accepted deviation can never compound
across experiments. Regenerate the artifact on a new machine with:
Moving the anchor (re-pinning gitSha) is a deliberate user-level
decision recorded in LOG.md, not a side effect of an experiment.
Budgets: maxAbsDelta is in smoothed escape iterations; flips
(escaper <-> interior) always fail; maxBlobPx bounds the largest
4-connected component of differing pixels; maxDiffFraction bounds the
share of differing pixels per tile.
